boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action under standing PO authorizing recurring invoice within tolerance?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No; current source records do not close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL says the required standing PO window and tolerance band dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: standing PO window and tolerance band remains unresolved before execution.

final_answer: Source records do not close the action boundary. The control record states the standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Per policy, AP may proceed only after exact source closure. Escalate to resolve the open dependency before any payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action.
open_blockers: standing PO window and tolerance band
